iteration_history.changes: Replaced verbose original SKILL.md with concise, task-targeted version. Removed theory, latex formulas, seasonal decomposition, cross-correlation, and Prophet sections. Provided two complete copy-paste-ready Python scripts: one for rolling z-score anomaly detection (window=14, threshold=2.5, outputs anomaly_report.json) and one for HP filter detrending (lambda=1600, log-transform, Pearson correlation, outputs detrending_results.json). Added explicit output format descriptions.
Consistency verification run. No changes made. Confirmed 100/100 on both tasks.

optimization_strategy: Condensed the original 198-line skill to ~80 lines by removing all non-essential content (theory, formulas, seasonal decomposition, cross-correlation, Prophet anomaly index) and providing complete, self-contained Python scripts that devstral-small can copy directly. Key optimizations: (1) exact output filenames and JSON structure specified, (2) complete import statements, (3) no fragmented code snippets requiring assembly, (4) explicit key names matching test expectations.
